title: STAT+: Pharmalittle: We’re reading about FDA and a ‘smear campaign,’ Cigna buying a large pharmacy, and more
description: FDA Commissioner Marty Makary defended the agency’s recent rejections of rare disease drugs and top agency official Vinay Prasad
